name: Extinguishing the Ashened
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>灰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>憤</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>怒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 DARK Pyro monster from your Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 Level 5 or higher Pyro monster from your GY to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Pyro monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Pyro Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only use each effect of "Extinguishing the Ashened" once per turn.
eff: Send 1 DARK Pyro monster from your Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 Level 5 or higher Pyro monster from your GY to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Pyro monsters. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 Pyro Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. You can only use each effect of "Extinguishing the Ashened" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
